creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Erik Jensen from comment #5)

Hello Erik!

That's nice that plist mechanics are being improved.
While I'm building big deps on aarch64, I did a quick build test on amd64 and all versions that I've tested shows same error:

amd64: 15 (main), 141, 140 and 133:

===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%ETCDIR%%/cling/lib/clang/%%ROOT_CLANG_VER%%/include/arm_bf%%ROOT_CLANG_VER%%.h
Error: Missing: %%ETCDIR%%/cling/lib/clang/%%ROOT_CLANG_VER%%/include/arm_cde.h
Error: Missing: %%ETCDIR%%/cling/lib/clang/%%ROOT_CLANG_VER%%/include/arm_fp%%ROOT_CLANG_VER%%.h
Error: Missing: %%ETCDIR%%/cling/lib/clang/%%ROOT_CLANG_VER%%/include/arm_mve.h
Error: Missing: %%ETCDIR%%/cling/lib/clang/%%ROOT_CLANG_VER%%/include/arm_neon.h
Error: Missing: %%ETCDIR%%/cling/lib/clang/%%ROOT_CLANG_VER%%/include/arm_sve.h

As always I don't like to interfere doing fixes as you know way better this program, its mechanics and port evolution related to fixes and improvements.

Related to PORTREVISIONs, since we are doing changes that needs to be tested on a slow machine, we could use PORTREVISION= 101, 102, 103, ..., so we can check better the logs and read better the results.
When the time of commit comes, I will change port revision accordingly.

Cheers
